title: SARIF AI emit profile — reporting descriptor object
description: Input contract for a SARIF reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to the add-reporting-descriptor verb (default target run.tool.driver.notifications[]). SARIF §3.49.3 requires a non-empty string id; the verb rejects a missing, null, non-string, or empty id. Use ai-rule-descriptor.schema.json for the --rules path, which additionally constrains id to the NOVEL- form.

id.description: Non-empty descriptor id (SARIF §3.49.3). Empty is rejected; whitespace-only is accepted, matching the verb's IsNullOrEmpty gate.
